name: eadm-online-services
description: e-ADM Online Services - B2B Organization Management

scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.deploy:backend: npm run build -w backend && aws cloudformation deploy --template-file infra/template.yaml --stack-name eadm-backend --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM && ./scripts/add-function-url.sh
